turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Hi, how long will my order take to arrive?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Standard shipping usually takes 3-5 business days after your order is processed.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, we offer express shipping options at checkout if they are available in your area.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I want to return a product I bought last week.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You can return most items within 30 days as long as they are unused and in the original packaging.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Do I have to pay for return shipping?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Return shipping is free on damaged or incorrect items. For other returns, fees depend on your location and reason for return.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Which payment methods do you support?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: We accept major credit and debit cards, as well as popular digital wallets. All available options show at checkout.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Cash on delivery is available in select regions. You will see the option during checkout if it is supported for your address.
